insert.if:
INSERT ALL
INTO budget_ledger_self_r (id, biz_type, related_id, amount_consumed_q_one, amount_consumed_q_two, amount_consumed_q_three, amount_consumed_q_four, creator, create_time, updater, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{item.id}, #{item.bizType}, #{item.relatedId}, #{item.amountConsumedQOne, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.amountConsumedQTwo, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.amountConsumedQThree, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.amountConsumedQFour, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updater}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleted})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
